name: Wobbly Move
description: Drag transition where the window turns to jelly around the pointer, in the spirit of the classic wobbly windows. The area under the cursor follows tightly while the far corners trail on a looser spring and shimmy to rest when you let go. Softness, reach and maximum bend are this pack's own parameters.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Softness
parameters.description: How far the body trails behind the motion, in milliseconds of lag

parameters.name: Reach
parameters.description: How far from the pointer the jelly zone extends (px), smaller values make a stiffer window

parameters.name: Maximum bend
parameters.description: Cap on how far any part of the window may trail (px)
